key.name: refresh-interval
key.description: Global fallback poll interval. Per-provider pollSeconds (stored in the providers JSON) overrides this when present.

key.name: providers
key.summary: JSON string of configured AI providers
key.description: Free-form JSON array of provider objects: {id, name, command, useApi, pollSeconds?, warnPct?, criticalPct?, notify?}.

key.name: display-mode
key.summary: Whether to show used or remaining quota in the numeric/time text

key.name: first-run
key.summary: Whether this is the first time the extension is run
